creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Edwin Groothuis <edwin@mavetju.org> -----

From: Edwin Groothuis <edwin@mavetju.org>
To: Gleb Smirnoff <glebius@FreeBSD.org>
Cc: freebsd-ports-bugs@FreeBSD.org, edwin@FreeBSD.org
Subject: Re: ports/178279: [patch] update astro/gpsd to 3.9
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10.7;
	rv:17.0) Gecko/20130328 Thunderbird/17.0.5

If you have a working patch, let me know and I'll approve it so you
can fix the port.
